name: G Mining Ventures Corp.
description: G Mining Ventures is a Québec-based gold producer and developer with its flagship Tocantinzinho (TZ) mine in the State of Pará, Brazil, which produces up to 200,000 oz gold per year and generated C$96 million in free cash flow in the first half of 2025. The company also holds the Oko West project under construction in Guyana and the Gurupi project in development in Brazil. GMIN transitioned from developer to producer and reached an all-time high stock price of C$58.74 in March 2026.
